2026-04-09T01:04:07.3377788Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3382030Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3382716Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3383190Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3389631Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3390655Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3390947Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3391379Z

2026-04-09T01:04:07.3431196Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:07.3431368Z   git switch -
